brand: Littafi Mai Tsarki a Gungumi Ɗaya
docTitle: Littafi Mai Tsarki a Taswira · Littafi Mai Tsarki a Gungumi Ɗaya
metaDesc: Bi tarihin Tsohon Alkawari, rayuwar Yesu, da tafiye-tafiyen Bulus a kan taswira ta gaske — Littafi Mai Tsarki ya faru ne a wuraren gaske.

s.kicker: Littafi Mai Tsarki a Gungumi Ɗaya · Taswira
s.title: Littafi Mai Tsarki a Taswira
s.verse: “Ai, ba tatsuniyoyi da aka ƙaga da wayo muka bi ba, sa'ad da muka sanar da ku ikon Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu, da kuma bayyanarsa, ɗaukakarsa ce muka gani muraran.” (2 Bitrus 1:16)
s.purpose: Littafi Mai Tsarki ba tatsuniya ba ne. Tarihi ne na mutanen da suka yi tafiya a wuraren gaske, kwanaki, da sunaye na gaske. Bi waɗannan hanyoyi a kan taswira, bisa tsarin lokaci — danna wuri, ko ka latsa ▶ don bi shi mataki-mataki.
s.ot_lead: Ba tafiya guda ba ce sai dai gudanar da tarihin fansa tun daga halitta: halitta da faɗuwa → ruwan tsufana da Babel → kira (Ibrahim) → ƙasar alkawari → Fitowa → jeji → cin ƙasa → mulki → rabuwa → bauta → komawa.
s.je_lead: Bi rayuwar Yesu kamar yadda Linjila suke ba da labari, bisa tsari — daga haihuwarsa a Baitalami har baftismarsa da hidimarsa a Galili, ta Samariya, zuwa gicciye, tashin matattu, da hawa sama a Urushalima.
s.pa_h: Daga Antakiya zuwa iyakar duniya — Roma
s.pa_lead: Daga Fentikos a Urushalima, yadda bishara ta yaɗu ya wuce Yahudiya — ta Asiya Ƙarama da Turai zuwa zuciyar daular. Zaɓi ɗaya daga cikin tafiye-tafiye biyar (1·2·3 + tafiya zuwa Roma + bayan an saki) ka kuma bi al'amuran Ayyukan Manzanni tare da wasiƙun da aka rubuta a hanya.
s.foot: Tushe · Wuraren sun bi rubutun Littafi Mai Tsarki da daidaitacciyar yanayin ƙasa na Littafi Mai Tsarki (da sunayen zamani inda ya dace). An zana bakin teku, koguna, da tafkuna daga buɗaɗɗun bayanan yanayin ƙasa (Natural Earth), an sauƙaƙe su.
s.contact: Tambayoyi · ra'ayi — Aiko mana imel

eden.name: Adan (Halitta · Faɗuwa)
eden.note: Cikin duniyar da aka yi “mai kyau ƙwarai,” zunubi ya shigo ya kuma yanke alaƙa tsakanin Allah da mutane.
events: Halitta cikin kwana shida — “mai kyau ƙwarai”
An yi mutum cikin kamannin Allah
Faɗuwa, da korar daga Adan
Alkawarin farko na bishara — “zuriyar mace za ta ƙuje kan maciji”

noah.name: Ararat (Ruwan Tsufana)
noah.today: Dutsen Ararat, gabashin Turkiya a yau
noah.note: Allah ya hukunta duniyar da ta cika da zunubi, duk da haka ya tsare rai ta wurin iyali guda.
events: Duniyar da ta cika da lalata
Ruwan tsufana, da jirgin Nuhu
Alkawarin bakan gizo — “ba za a ƙara hallaka duniya da ruwa ba”

babel.name: Hasumiyar Babel
babel.note: A kan girman kai da yake nema ya kai sama, Allah ya rikitar da harshensu ya kuma watsar da mutane a duniya.
events: “Mu gina birni da hasumiya… mu yi wa kanmu suna”
Allah ya rikitar da harshensu
Mutane suka watse a duniya (Shinar — daga baya Babila)

ur.name: Ur
ur.note: Labarin fansa na Littafi Mai Tsarki ya fara da kiran mutum guda.
events: Allah ya kira Abram daga Ur ta Kaldiyawa
“Zan maishe ka al'umma mai girma… dukan al'ummai za su sami albarka ta wurinka”
Ta wurin bangaskiya ya bar ƙasarsa

haran.name: Haran
haran.note: A kan hanya, yana amsa kiran zuwa ƙasar alkawari.
events: Iyalin Tera suka zauna a Haran
Tera ya mutu
Abram ya kama hanya zuwa Kan'ana yana da shekara 75

shechem.name: Shekem · Kan'ana
shechem.note: A ƙasar alkawari aka kafa iyali, alkawarin kuwa ya gangaro daga tsara zuwa tsara.
events: Shiga Kan'ana, bagade na farko — “zan ba zuriyarka wannan ƙasa”
Alkawari (Farawa 15) · Ishaku · Yakubu
'Ya'yan Yakubu goma sha biyu — tushen kabilu goma sha biyu

egypt.name: Masar (Goshen)
egypt.note: Iyali ya zama al'umma mai girma — sa'an nan al'ummar bayi.
events: Yusufu, da aka sayar, ya tashi ya yi mulki a Masar
Dukan iyalin Yakubu suka gangaro don su tsere wa yunwa
Al'ummar Isra'ila mai girma an mai da ita bayi

sinai.name: Dutsen Sinai
sinai.note: Babbar fansa ta Tsohon Alkawari — bayi sun zama jama'ar Allah.
events: Annoba goma da ɗan ragon Idin Ƙetarewa
Bahar Maliya ya rabu suka kuma ƙetare
Dokoki Goma, Shari'a, Alfarwa da hadayu

kadesh.name: Kadesh (jeji)
kadesh.note: Rashin bangaskiya ya hana wani zamani ƙasar — duk da haka Allah ya kasance tare da su.
events: 'Yan leƙen asiri goma sha biyu — amma jama'a suka ƙi su gaskata
Shekara 38 a jeji — manna, girgije da wuta
A filin Mowab, wa'azin ƙarshe na Musa (Kubawar Shari'a)

jericho.name: Yariko
jericho.note: A ƙarshe suka shiga suka kuma ci ƙasar alkawari.
events: Kogin Urdun ya rabu jama'a kuwa suka ƙetare
Garun Yariko suka faɗi
Cin Kan'ana da rabon ƙasar

shiloh.name: Shilo (Alƙalai)
shiloh.note: Babu sarki, kowa yana yin abin da ya ga dama — ana bukatar sarki na gaskiya.
events: An kafa Alfarwa a Shilo
Da'irar zunubi–danniya–ceto (Debora, Gidiyon, Samson)
Rut — aminci a kwanaki masu duhu, cikin zuriyar Dawuda

jerusalem.name: Urushalima · Mulki Haɗaɗɗe
jerusalem.note: Zamanin ɗaukakar Isra'ila — da alkawarin sarki na har abada.
events: Shawulu sarki na farko, sa'an nan Dawuda da Goliyat
Alkawari da Dawuda — “gadon sarautarka har abada” (2 Sama'ila 7)
Sulemanu ya gina haikali a Urushalima

samaria.name: Samariya · Mulki Rabe-rabe
samaria.note: Mulkin ya rabu ya kuma gangara yayin da annabawa suke kuka.
events: Bayan Sulemanu, rabuwa zuwa Yahuda da Isra'ila
Bautar gumaka da aka maimaita
Iliya, Ishaya, Irmiya suna kira ‘ku komo’ — suna kuma annabta Almasihu

nineveh.name: Ninawa (Assuriya)
nineveh.note: Da suka ƙyale kowane gargaɗi, arewa ya fara faɗuwa.
events: Ninawa, babban birnin Assuriya
Mulkin arewa ya faɗi ga Assuriya (722 K.H.)
An aiki Yunusa zuwa Ninawa

babylon.name: Babila
babylon.note: Dare mafi duhu — duk da haka alkawarin mayarwa ya rage.
events: Urushalima ta faɗi, haikali ya ƙone (586 K.H.)
An kwashe Yahuda zuwa Babila
Daniyel da Ezekiyel — bangaskiya da wahayoyi cikin bauta

susa.name: Shushan (Farisa)
susa.note: Har a zuciyar daular arna, Allah yana tsare jama'arsa.
events: Farisa ta kayar da Babila
Esta ta ceci Yahudawa daga halaka
Nehemiya ya yi addu'a a gaban sarki aka kuma aike shi

return.name: Komawa Urushalima
return.note: Suka dawo suka kuma sāke gina — amma babu sarkin da ya zo. Suna jiran Almasihu.
events: Igiyoyi uku na komawa ta dokar Sairus (Zarubabel 538 · Ezra 458 · Nehemiya 444)
An sāke gina haikali da garun Urushalima
Malaki — Tsohon Alkawari ya rufe: “Zan aiki manzona”

bethlehem.name: Baitalami
bethlehem.note: Almasihu da aka yi alkawari ya zo birnin Dawuda — Kalma ya zama mutum.
events: An haife shi a Baitalami, birnin Dawuda
Mala'iku suka sanar wa makiyaya labarin
Masu hikima suka zo su yi sujada

nazareth.name: Nazarat
nazareth.note: Allah ya yi girma a matsayin mutum a wani gari na yau da kullum.
events: An rene shi a gidan masassaƙi
Yana da shekara goma sha biyu, yana tambaya da amsawa a haikali
Daga baya aka ƙi shi a majami'ar garinsa

jordan.name: Kogin Urdun
jordan.note: Hidimarsa ta jama'a ta fara — sama ya tabbatar da shi a matsayin Ɗa.
events: Yahaya ya yi masa baftisma
Ruhu ya sauko kamar kurciya — “Wannan ƙaunataccen Ɗana ne”
Ya ci nasara a kan jarrabai uku na Shaiɗan a jeji

cana.name: Kana
cana.note: A mu'ujizarsa ta farko ya bayyana ɗaukakarsa.
events: Baƙo a wajen biki
Ruwa ya juya ya zama ruwan inabi — mu'ujizarsa ta farko
Almajiransa suka gaskata da shi

sychar.name: Saichar (Samariya)
sychar.note: Hanyar hidimar farko — ta Urushalima zuwa Samariya da aka raina.
events: Ya tsabtace haikali a Urushalima
Da dare, Nikodimu — “Dole ne a sāke haifuwarka”
Ruwan rai ga mace Basamariya

capernaum.name: Kafarnahum
capernaum.note: Cibiyar hidimar Galili — kira, koyarwa, da hamayya duk suka haɗu a nan.
events: Ya kira masunta ya kuma maishe nan cibiyarsa
Hudubar bisa Dutse — “Masu albarka ne matalauta a ruhu”
Misalan mulki — da hamayya mai tasowa

galilee.name: Tafkin Galili
galilee.note: Da iko a kan halitta ya nuna ko wane ne shi.
events: “Yi shiru, ka natsu” — ya kwantar da hadari
Ya ciyar da dubu biyar da gurasa biyar da kifi biyu
Ya yi tafiya a kan ruwa

caesarea_p.name: Kaisariya Filibi
caesarea_p.note: Almajirai suka fahimci shi ne Almasihu, hanyar gicciye kuwa ta buɗe.
events: Furucin Bitrus — “Kai ne Almasihu, Ɗan Allah mai rai”
Ya fara annabta mutuwarsa da tashinsa
An sake kamanninsa cikin ɗaukaka a kan dutse

jericho.name: Yariko
jericho.note: A kan hanyar haurawa zuwa Urushalima, yana neman ɓatattu.
events: Ya ba makaho Bartimawus gani
Ya kira Zakka mai karɓar haraji
“Ɗan Mutum ya zo ne domin ya nemo ya kuma ceci ɓatattu”

bethany.name: Baitanya
bethany.note: Ya nuna iko a kan mutuwa jajiɓirin makonsa na ƙarshe.
events: Ya tā da Li'azaru daga kabari — “Ni ne tashin matattu da rai”
Maryamu ta shafa masa man jana'iza
Wannan mu'ujiza ta ƙarfafa makircin kashe shi

jerusalem.name: Urushalima
jerusalem.note: Ƙololuwar da dukan Littafi Mai Tsarki yake nuni gare ta — gicciye, tashin matattu, hawa sama.
events: Shigowa cikin nasara; ya sāke kifar da tebura na haikali
A Jibin Ƙarshe ya wanke ƙafafun almajirai
Ya mutu a kan gicciye
Ya tashi a rana ta uku, sa'an nan ya hau sama

antioch.name: Antakiya
antioch.note: Ikkilisiyar da take aikawa, inda hidimar Al'ummai ta fara take kuma komawa.
events: Cikin addu'a Ruhu ya keɓe Barnaba da Shawulu
Ikkilisiyar da aka fara kiran masu bi ‘Kiristoci’
Wurin farawa na tafiye-tafiye na 1, 2 da 3

seleucia.name: Selukiya
seleucia.note: Tashar Antakiya — suka tashi zuwa Kubrus.

salamis.name: Salamis (Kubrus)
salamis.note: Tasha ta farko a Kubrus — suna wa'azi a majami'u.

paphos.name: Bafusa
paphos.note: An nuna iko a kan masu hamayya da bishara.
events: Elimas matsafi ya zama makaho
Sergiyus Bulus mai mulki ya gaskata
Daga nan ‘Bulus’ ya ɗauki jagoranci

perga.name: Farga
perga.note: Tasha a Bamfiliya — a nan Yahaya Markus ya juya baya.

pantioch.name: Antakiyar Bisidiya
events: Doguwar hudubar tarihin ceto a majami'a
Al'ummai da yawa suka yi farin ciki suka karɓi maganar
An kore shi saboda hamayya

iconium.name: Ikoniyum
iconium.note: Mutane da yawa suka gaskata, amma tsanani ya kore su gaba.

lystra.name: Listira
lystra.note: An ɗauke shi a matsayin allah, sa'an nan aka jajjefe shi.
events: Ya warkar da gurgu tun haihuwa
Taron mutane sun yi ƙoƙarin yi musu hadaya kamar alloli
An jajjefe shi aka bar shi kamar matacce, ya tashi

derbe.name: Darbe
derbe.note: Almajirai da yawa aka samu; suka koma kan sawunsu don ƙarfafa ikkilisiyoyi.

troas.name: Taruwasa
troas.note: Mahawarar da bishara ta fara nufa Turai.
events: Wahayin wani mutumin Makidoniya
“Ka ƙetaro zuwa nan ka taimake mu”
Nan da nan suka ƙetare zuwa Turai

philippi.name: Filibi
philippi.note: Ikkilisiya ta farko a Turai — bishara ta yi nasara har cikin kurkuku.
events: Lidiya, mai sayar da shunayya, ta gaskata
An 'yantar da yarinya mai ruhun duba
Waƙoƙin tsakar dare, girgizar ƙasa, iyalin mai gadi suka sami ceto

thess.name: Tasalonika
thess.note: Maganar ta girgiza birnin hamayya kuwa ta tashi.
events: Ya yi muhawara a majami'a Asabar uku
“Waɗannan da suka juya duniya ƙasa-ƙasa”
Suka tsere da dare

berea.name: Biriya
berea.note: ‘Masu hankali’ waɗanda suka bincika maganar da kansu.
events: Suka karɓi maganar da marmari
Kowace rana suna binciken Littattafai don tabbatarwa
Da yawa suka gaskata

athens.name: Atina
athens.note: A birnin masu falsafa ya yi shelar ‘allah da ba a sani ba’.
events: Birni cike da gumaka ya tunzura shi
A kan Areyofagus ya yi wa'azin Mahalicci da tashin matattu
An yi masa ba'a, duk da haka kaɗan suka gaskata

corinth.name: Korinti
corinth.note: Ya zauna shekara ɗaya da rabi, yana kafa ikkilisiya a birni mai fasadi.
events: Yana yin tanti tare da Akila da Birsila
“Kada ka ji tsoro… gama ina tare da kai”
Korintiyawa da yawa suka gaskata aka kuma yi musu baftisma

ephesus.name: Afisa
ephesus.note: Zuciyar tafiya ta uku — maganar ta yaɗu cikin Asiya.
events: Koyarwa kowace rana shekara biyu a zaurin Tiranus
An ƙone littattafan sihiri; ayyuka masu iko
Dimitiriyus maƙerin azurfa ya tā da hargitsi

miletus.name: Militus
miletus.note: Bankwana mai hawaye da dattawan Afisa.
events: “Ku lura da ikkilisiyar da ya saya da jininsa”
Dattawan suka yi kuka, da suka san ba za su ƙara ganinsa ba

caesarea.name: Kaisariya
caesarea.note: Shekara biyu ya kāre bishara a gaban gwamnoni da sarki.
events: Shari'u a gaban gwamnoni Felikus da Festus
Kāriyarsa a gaban Sarki Agaribas
“Ina ɗaukaka ƙara ga Kaisar” — zuwa Roma

jerusalem.name: Urushalima
jerusalem.note: An kama shi a haikali, hanyarsa a matsayin ɗan kurkuku ta fara.
events: Taron mutane suka kama shi a haikali
Ya kāre kansa a gaban majalisa
A matsayin ɗan ƙasar Roma, an aike shi a tsare zuwa Kaisariya

myra.name: Mira
myra.note: Suka koma jirgin Iskandariya mai zuwa Roma.

fairhaven.name: Tashoshi Masu Kyau (Karita)
fairhaven.note: Gargaɗin Bulus na a daina tafiya bai sami kunne ba.

crete.name: Karita
crete.note: Bayan an saki shi, tsibirin da ya bar Titus don ya gyara ikkilisiyoyi.
events: Ya bar Titus ya naɗa dattawa a kowane gari
Ya nemi shugabanni marasa aibu, amintattu
Ya rubuta wasiƙa zuwa ga Titus

malta.name: Malta
malta.note: Cikin hadari da nutsewar jirgi, alkawarin Allah ya tabbata.
events: ‘Iskar arewa-maso-gabas’ ta farfasa jirgin, duk da haka dukan 276 suka tsira
Maciji ya sare shi, bai ji ciwo ba
Ya warkar da marasa lafiya na tsibirin

syracuse.name: Sirakus
syracuse.note: Suka zauna kwana uku a Sicily.

puteoli.name: Futiyoli
puteoli.note: Suka sauka a Italiya 'yan'uwa masu bi suka kuwa tarbe su.

rome.name: Roma
rome.note: A ƙarshe bishara ta isa zuciyar daular — ba ƙarshe ba ne sai dai farawa.
events: Shekara biyu a tsare a gida, yana shelar mulki gabagaɗi
Daga nan ya rubuta Wasiƙun Kurkuku (Afisawa·Filibiyawa·Kolosiyawa·Filimon)
Daga baya an sāke ɗaure shi, ya rubuta 2 Timoti aka kuma kashe shi — “Na yi fama mai kyau, na gama tseren”

journeys.j5: Tafiya ta biyar · bayan an saki
